headline: Gilead Agrees $5 Billion Tubulis Acquisition To Expand Cancer Drug Pipeline
summary: Biotech will pay $3.15 billion upfront plus milestones to acquire ADC-focused Tubulis, strengthening oncology pipeline and research capabilities.

headline: With 3 quick buyouts, Gilead leans into its latest transformation
summary: On a conference call with analysts, Gilead walked through how a string of recent deals focused on cancer and autoimmune conditions could help a diversification plan it’s long struggled to execute.
